channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Israeli strikes hit Beirut suburbs
item.description: This is the moment an Israeli air attack hit a residential area in Beirut’s southern suburbs.

item.title: Iran fires missiles, drones at Gulf nations as ship hit in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Tehran keeps up daily pressure as UNSC readies vote on GCC bid urging Iran to halt attacks on neighbours.

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 12 of US-Israel attacks?
item.description: Iran says more than 1,300 civilians have been killed and nearly 10,000 civilian sites have been hit by Israel and US.

item.title: ‘The other side’ of IITs: Student suicides haunt India’s top tech schools
item.description: Nearly 160 deaths recorded across the premier engineering colleges in past two decades - 69 of them in last five years.

item.title: The ‘orphan pearl’: Inside Kharg, the beating heart of Iran’s oil empire
item.description: On Iran's 'Forbidden Island' of Kharg, ancient ruins sit beside the nerve centre of the nation's oil empire.

item.title: Beirut building ablaze after apparent Israeli strike
item.description: A residential building in Beirut was seen with flames erupting from a hole in its side after an apparent Israeli strike.

item.title: Qatari minister says ‘regional countries are not an enemy of Iran’
item.description: Mohammed bin Abdulaziz al-Khulaifi also says Qatar and Oman cannot act as mediators while under attack.

item.title: Oil prices swing wildly amid mixed messages over Iran war
item.description: Crude oil prices fall sharply as energy markets remain on tenterhooks over effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: N Korea ‘respects’ Iran’s selection of Mojtaba Khamenei as supreme leader
item.description: North Korean Foreign Ministry spokesperson condemns the US and Israel's 'unlawful military attack against Iran'.

item.title: Bodies recovered after US-Israeli strikes hit Tehran
item.description: Video released by the Iranian Red Crescent show rescue teams retrieving bodies after US-Israeli strikes hit Tehran.
